local_codex_execution.codex_default_command_strategy: prefer $HOME/bin/codex-canonical when executable, otherwise use PATH codex
local_codex_execution.python_command_requirement: screenshot review and export helpers must execute on a Python executable with playwright installed
current_host_latest_route_proof: 2026-04-13: local Codex CLI route and OPL stage execution pass repo smoke with structured generation held inside runtime-family.
2026-04-13: ppt_deck / xiaohongshu / poster_onepager creative stages stay on AI-first Codex structured generation without pack/compiler fallback.

ci_quality_lane_reason: test:smoke is the minimal local entry, test:fast is the hosted core regression lane, meta:ci runs only the meta remainder not already covered by fast, integration:remaining keeps local fast-then-integration verification from rerunning fast-covered integration files, full:remaining keeps local fast-meta-integration verification from rerunning already covered active files, historical stays explicit through test:historical or full:with-historical, route-heavy Codex/browser verification files stay serialized, and proof-only browser/renderer setup stays in the explicit native-ppt-proof and image-ppt-proof jobs instead of the default quality lane
